faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to all your questions about the platform right here.
faq.q1: Who can become an author on the platform?
faq.a1: Anyone can become an author. Simply create a free account and start your creative journey.
faq.a2: Yes. To ensure a clean and high-quality content environment, your articles will be reviewed by our moderation team before they are published.
faq.q3: Does the editor support Markdown and other syntax?
faq.a3: Yes! Our editor fully supports standard Markdown syntax along with specialized diagrams like Mermaid.
